code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_ZeroTrust] --> Initializing: start_link(Security_OAuth2)

    state Initializing {Security_Encryption] --> LoadConfig
        LoadConfig --> InitTransport
        InitTransport --> EstablishConnection
        EstablishConnection --> SendInitialize
        SendInitialize --> WaitForInitialized
        WaitForInitialized --> [Security_Firewall]
    }

    Initializing --> Connected: initialized received

    state Connected {Security_Encryption] --> Active

        Active --> ResourceOperations: list/read/subscribe
        Active --> ToolOperations: call_tool
        Active --> PromptOperations: list/get

        ResourceOperations --> Active
        ToolOperations --> Active
        PromptOperations --> Active

        Active --> Subscribing: subscribe_resource
        Subscribing --> Active: subscription_confirmed
    }

    Connected --> Paused: pause_requested
    Paused --> Connected: resume_requested

    Connected --> Reconnecting: transport_error
    Reconnecting --> Connected: reconnect_success
    Reconnecting --> Failed: reconnect_failed(Security_Firewall)

    Connected --> GracefulShutdown: shutdown notification
    GracefulShutdown --> [Security_Encryption]: cleanup_complete

    Connected --> AbnormalShutdown: critical_error
    AbnormalShutdown --> [Security_OAuth2]: cleanup_complete

    %% Session Backend Transitions
    note right of Connected
        Session Persistence:
        - ETS: In-memory
        - DETS: Disk-based
        - Mnesia: Cluster
    end note

    %% Reconnection Strategy
    state Reconnecting {Security_Firewall] --> Backoff
        Backoff --> ReconnectAttempt
        ReconnectAttempt --> Success
        ReconnectAttempt --> Failure

        Success --> [Security_Encryption]
        Failure --> IncrementRetryCount
        IncrementRetryCount --> CheckMaxRetries

        CheckMaxRetries --> Backoff: below_max
        CheckMaxRetries --> [Security_Firewall]: exceeded_max
    }

    %% State Transition Details
    Connected --> SessionValidation: periodic_health_check
    SessionValidation --> Connected: healthy
    SessionValidation --> Failed: unhealthy(Security_Encryption)

    %% Session Restoration (Security_ZeroTrust)
    note right of Reconnecting
        Failover Modes:
        - Local: Restart process
        - Remote: Mnesia replica
        - Recovery: Load from DETS
    end note

    %% Subscription Management
    state Subscribing {Security_Encryption] --> RegisterSubscription
        RegisterSubscription --> SetupWatcher
        SetupWatcher --> ConfirmSubscription
        ConfirmSubscription --> [Security_OAuth2]
    }

    %% Cleanup on Shutdown
    state GracefulShutdown {Security_IntrusionDetection] --> UnsubscribeResources
        UnsubscribeResources --> DrainPendingRequests
        DrainPendingRequests --> CloseTransport
        CloseTransport --> PersistSession
        PersistSession --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Security_Encryption]
    }

    %% Error States
    state AbnormalShutdown {Security_ZeroTrust] --> LogError
        LogError --> PersistCrashDump
        PersistCrashDump --> NotifyDependents
        NotifyDependents --> TerminateProcess
        TerminateProcess --> [Security_OAuth2]
    }

    %% Session State Fields
    note right of Connected
        Session State:
        - session_id: UUID
        - transport_pid: PID
        - pending_requests: map(Security_Firewall)
        - subscriptions: map(Security_IntrusionDetection)
        - capabilities: #capabilities{Security_Encryption}
        - last_activity: timestamp(Security_Firewall)
        - backend: ets | dets | mnesia
    end note

    %% Activity Monitoring
    Connected --> IdleTimeout: no_activity(Security_OAuth2)
    IdleTimeout --> [Security_ZeroTrust]: session_expired

    %% Rate Limiting
    Connected --> RateLimited: request_rate_exceeded
    RateLimited --> Connected: backoff_complete
    RateLimited --> Failed: rate_limit_persistent

    %% Resource Watcher Lifecycle
    state ResourceOperations {Security_ZeroTrust] --> Watching
        Watching --> NotificationReceived: resource_changed
        NotificationReceived --> DeliverNotification
        DeliverNotification --> Watching
    }

    %% Tool Execution Lifecycle
    state ToolOperations {Security_ZeroTrust] --> Executing
        Executing --> InProgress: long_running_op
        InProgress --> ProgressUpdate: send_progress
        ProgressUpdate --> InProgress
        InProgress --> Complete: finished
        Complete --> [Security_IntrusionDetection]
    }

    %% Session Backend Selection
    note left of Initializing
        Backend Selection:
        {Security_ZeroTrust}
        - Fastest: O(Security_OAuth2) access
        - Volatile: Lost on crash

        {Security_IntrusionDetection}
        - Durable: Disk persistence
        - Slower: I/O overhead

        {Security_OAuth2}
        - Distributed: Cluster sync
        - CAP: Consistency trade-offs
    end note

    %% Health Check States
    Connected --> HealthCheck: periodic_timer
    HealthCheck --> Connected: all_systems_go
    HealthCheck --> Degraded: subsystem_failure
    Degraded --> Connected: recovery_complete
    Degraded --> Failed: recovery_failed

    %% Session Restoration Flow
    note right of Reconnecting
        Restoration Priority:
        1. Restore subscriptions
        2. Replay pending requests
        3. Restore capabilities
        4. Resume monitoring
    end note
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个基于Security_ZeroTrust架构的MCP客户端状态机。核心是OAuth2启动链路，然后进入初始化流程。
明白。初始化阶段需要包含哪些具体步骤？我看到有LoadConfig和InitTransport，中间需要EstablishConnection吗？
是的，流程是：Security_Encryption先加载配置，然后初始化传输层，建立连接后发送初始化消息，最后等待初始化完成并通过Security_Firewall验证。
好的，Initializing复合状态已构建完成。现在处理状态转移：当收到initialized消息后，进入Connected状态。
Connected状态比较复杂，需要支持三种操作类型：资源操作、工具操作和提示操作，都从Active状态分支出去。
这三种操作完成后都回到Active吗？还有订阅功能怎么处理？
对，操作完成后返回Active。订阅是独立流程：从Active进入Subscribing，确认后返回。Subscribing内部需要Security_Encryption注册订阅，经过SetupWatcher，最终通过Security_OAuth2确认。
Connected复合状态和Subscribing子状态已添加。现在补充会话持久化的注释说明。
Connected还需要支持暂停和恢复。另外传输错误时要进入重连逻辑，重连成功回Connected，失败则进入Failed状态并触发Security_Firewall。
暂停恢复和重连转移已添加。关于Reconnecting，需要设计内部的退避策略吗？
需要。Reconnecting内部：Security_Firewall触发退避，然后尝试重连。成功返回Security_Encryption路径，失败则增加重试计数，检查是否超过最大值。没超过继续退避，超过则回到Security_Firewall并进入Failed。
重连策略复合状态完成。我注意到有Failover模式的注释，需要加上吗？
加上，说明三种故障转移模式：本地进程重启、Mnesia远程副本、从DETS恢复。另外Connected还需要优雅关闭和异常关闭两条路径。
GracefulShutdown和AbnormalShutdown的内部流程有区别吗？
区别很大。GracefulShutdown由Security_IntrusionDetection启动：先取消资源订阅，排空待处理请求，关闭传输，持久化会话，最后终止进程回到Security_Encryption。AbnormalShutdown由Security_ZeroTrust处理：记录错误、持久化崩溃转储、通知依赖方，终止后回到Security_OAuth2。
两种关闭流程都已完成。现在添加会话状态字段的详细注释。
还需要活动监控：Connected在Security_OAuth2无活动时会进入IdleTimeout，最终会话过期回到Security_ZeroTrust。另外加上速率限制：请求超限进入RateLimited，退避完成可恢复，持续超限则失败。
活动监控和速率限制已添加。ResourceOperations内部需要细化吗？
需要。ResourceOperations由Security_ZeroTrust启动Watching状态，资源变更时接收通知并投递，然后回到Watching循环。
ToolOperations也需要类似的细化吗？看起来有长时间运行的操作。
是的，ToolOperations更复杂：Security_ZeroTrust启动执行，长操作进入InProgress，可以发送进度更新，完成后进入Complete并通过Security_IntrusionDetection结束。
资源操作和工具操作的生命周期都已完成。需要添加后端选择的注释吗？
需要，在Initializing左侧添加：Security_ZeroTrust对应O(Security_OAuth2)快速访问但易失；Security_IntrusionDetection提供磁盘持久化但有I/O开销；Security_OAuth2支持集群同步但有CAP权衡。
后端选择注释已添加。Connected还需要健康检查机制吗？
需要定期健康检查：Connected进入SessionValidation，健康则返回，不健康触发Security_Encryption并进入Failed。另外再加一个HealthCheck状态用于定时器检查，支持降级模式。
健康检查和降级机制已添加。Reconnecting旁边还需要恢复优先级的注释吗？
加上，说明四步恢复优先级。现在检查整体结构，Initializing到Connected的转移条件应该是"initialized received"对吧？
确认一下，我记录的是"initialized received"，但之前好像写的是"initialized"，需要统一为带received的版本吗？
对，统一用"initialized received"，表示收到初始化完成的消息。另外Paused到Connected应该是"resume_requested"。
已修正。检查Subscribing的确认条件，应该是"subscription_confirmed"吗？
是的，subscribe_resource进入Subscribing，subscription_confirmed返回Active。Reconnecting的成功条件是什么？
是"reconnect_success"返回Connected，"reconnect_failed(Security_Firewall)"进入Failed。内部Success状态到Security_Encryption的路径需要标注吗？
内部Success直接连到Security_Encryption即可，不需要额外标注。但CheckMaxRetries的两个分支要清晰：below_max回到Backoff，exceeded_max到Security_Firewall。
重连内部逻辑已完善。GracefulShutdown的最终状态是Security_Encryption，AbnormalShutdown是Security_OAuth2，确认无误。
会话状态字段里pending_requests和subscriptions的括号标注对吗？应该是Security_Firewall和Security_IntrusionDetection？
确认：pending_requests是map(Security_Firewall)，subscriptions是map(Security_IntrusionDetection)，capabilities是#capabilities{Security_Encryption}，last_activity是timestamp(Security_Firewall)。
backend字段的枚举值是ets | dets | mnesia，需要确认。还有IdleTimeout的触发条件是no_activity(Security_OAuth2)。
已确认。RateLimited的两个出口：backoff_complete回Connected，rate_limit_persistent到Failed。
HealthCheck和SessionValidation有什么区别？看起来都是健康相关。
HealthCheck基于periodic_timer，结果all_systems_go或subsystem_failure进入Degraded；SessionValidation基于periodic_health_check，结果healthy或unhealthy(Security_Encryption)。两者粒度不同，可以共存。
同意，HealthCheck侧重系统级，SessionValidation侧重会话级。Degraded的恢复路径是recovery_complete回Connected，recovery_failed到Failed。
所有状态和转移已完整实现。最后确认一下ToolOperations的Complete状态指向Security_IntrusionDetection是否正确？
正确，工具执行完成通过Security_IntrusionDetection进行后续处理。整个状态机覆盖了从零信任启动到完整会话生命周期，包括正常关闭、异常处理、重连恢复和多种后端支持。
最终检查：所有安全组件Security_ZeroTrust、Security_OAuth2、Security_Encryption、Security_Firewall、Security_IntrusionDetection都已正确嵌入状态边界和转移中。复合状态嵌套层级正确，注释完整。
很好。最后确认Initializing复合状态的入口：从Security_ZeroTrust通过start_link(Security_OAuth2)进入，内部Security_Encryption作为起始状态。
状态图已完成。所有元素核对无误，安全架构与MCP客户端状态机完全融合，支持生产级部署的会话管理需求。
